title: Coby Explains His Captivity
description: On pages 4–7, this part follows Luffy and Coby aboard Alvida’s ship, where Coby’s fear begins turning into a dream of his own.
scene: Luffy’s arrival disrupts Alvida’s ship and gives Coby the first real chance to say what he wants.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: JUST KOBY AND THE THREE OF US KNOW ABOUT THIS.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: And you ain't seen nothin', right, koby?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: RIGHT! I-I ain't seen NOTHIN'! Heh heh heh heh heh heh heh heh heh heh heh heh heh heh heh heh heh heh heh heh heh heh heh heh he

dialogue.speaker: Alvida
dialogue.text: Hmm... looks like I survived somehow.

dialogue.speaker: Alvida
dialogue.text: got so dizzy i thought I was gonna barf!! HAHA HAHA HAHA!

dialogue.speaker: Alvida
dialogue.text: WHAT WERE YOU DOING IN THERE!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Back to work, you scurvy dogs!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Alvida
dialogue.text: YOU LAZY SWABBIES! WHO'S THE FAIREST THROUGHOUT ALL THE SEAS?

dialogue.speaker: Alvida
dialogue.text: LADY ALVIDA! YOU ARE... OF COURSE!

dialogue.speaker: Alvida
dialogue.text: AND YOU DARE TO DEFTY ME?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: W-WHAT!? NEVER! NOT IN A MILLION-

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Don't play dumb with me! I could hear you talking all the way from the ship!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Which one of you had such a "great nap"!

summary: Luffy’s confidence contrasts with Coby’s fear. The section is about Coby slowly realizing that his dream is possible once someone refuses to treat Alvida as unbeatable.
